results.reason: Validated via targeted unit tests for repo install flow: successful GitHub repo install path normalizes metadata and persists sourceType=repo, with plugin registration paths covered by registry tests.
evidence: curl POST /command/list_node_provider_plugins -> shows existing repo-sourced plugin records with sourceType=repo

results.reason: Validated through real upload API and registry listing: namespaced zip plugin installed as sourceType=zip and its node definition became available.
evidence: curl POST /command/list_node_provider_plugins -> includes utv-ext-g1-zip-plugin with sourceType=zip

results.reason: Manifest validation paths are enforced with actionable errors for missing/invalid fields, invalid IDs, unsupported versions, and missing runtime entrypoint; confirmed by tests and API error responses.
evidence: uv run pytest -vv ... test_manifest_validation_errors_are_actionable ... -> all parametrized cases PASSED
curl POST /upload/import_node_provider_plugin (utv_ext_g1_missing_manifest.zip) -> EXECUTION_ERROR: Node provider plugin is missing node-provider.yaml

results.reason: Security enforcement is incomplete for repo installs: zip upload protections exist, but repo archive extraction uses raw extractall without traversal guard in install_from_repo, leaving an explicit validation gap.
evidence: curl POST /command/install_node_provider_plugin_from_repo (http://github.com/utv_ext_g1/repo) -> EXECUTION_ERROR: repoUrl must use https:// for GitHub installs
curl POST /command/install_node_provider_plugin_from_repo (pluginPath=../utv_ext_g1_escape) -> EXECUTION_ERROR: pluginPath must be a relative path without traversal
rg -n "_safe_extract|extractall" backend/services/node_provider_plugin_manager.py -> repo path uses zf.extractall(tmp_dir / 'repo') at line 560

results.reason: No forced np: prefix behavior observed; provider node types are plugin-scoped ({plugin_id}:{node_type}) and unit tests explicitly enforce no np: prefix.
evidence: curl POST /command/list_node_provider_definitions -> type utv_ext_g2_lifecycle:echo (no np: prefix)

results.reason: Dependency installation behavior is covered with success, fallback, and clear failure messaging that includes plugin context; rollback on failure is validated.

commands.observation: Created namespaced valid plugin archive at /tmp/utv_ext_g1_valid_plugin.zip (770 bytes)
Plugin list included utv-ext-g1-zip-plugin with sourceType=zip
Created malformed fixtures for manifest and traversal validation
Returned EXECUTION_ERROR: Node provider plugin is missing node-provider.yaml
Returned EXECUTION_ERROR: Archive contains invalid path traversal entries
Returned EXECUTION_ERROR: repoUrl must use https:// for GitHub installs
Returned EXECUTION_ERROR: pluginPath must be a relative path without traversal
Found guarded zip path plus unguarded repo extraction: zf.extractall(tmp_dir / 'repo')
No matches in targeted backend registry/route index files

interactiveChecks.action: Upload namespaced valid plugin zip via backend upload API
interactiveChecks.observed: Install succeeded and plugin appeared with sourceType=zip; definition type surfaced as utv-ext-g1-zip-plugin:echo
Removal succeeded and plugin no longer appeared in list

interactiveChecks.action: Submit invalid repo install payloads (non-https URL and traversal pluginPath)
interactiveChecks.observed: Both rejected with explicit validation errors

frictions: Backend health probe at /health returned 404 while API root/openapi/command routes were healthy; used /openapi.json and command endpoints for validation.
Live install from arbitrary GitHub sample repo URL returned 404, so VAL-EXT-001 relied on targeted unit tests for successful repo-install path confirmation.
